name: Pest
description: Elegant PHP testing framework with expressive it()/test() syntax built on top of PHPUnit, adding architecture tests, mutation testing and browser testing via Playwright.

seo.title: Pest — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Pest: Elegant PHP testing framework with expressive it()/test() syntax built on top of PHPUnit, adding architecture tests, mutation testing and browser testing

when_to_use: Elegant PHP tests with it()/test() syntax over PHPUnit
Mutation testing built into Pest for coverage quality
Architecture tests asserting PHP code structure rules
Playwright-powered browser tests from PHP test suites

pros: Expressive it()/test() syntax vs verbose PHPUnit
Built on PHPUnit, full compatibility kept
Mutation testing and Playwright browser tests included
cons: Pest 3 premium features require paid license
Abstraction over PHPUnit can hide underlying issues
Team must learn Pest idioms on top of PHPUnit
review.verdict: The most enjoyable PHP testing experience today, especially for Laravel shops willing to adopt its conventions.
review.best_for: Laravel and modern PHP teams who want readable, expressive test syntax
review.not_for: Legacy PHP codebases deeply coupled to PHPUnit's xUnit style

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
